text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right before training, Matikanefukukitaru calls
me to the academy library. It's pitch black inside.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hohoho... Welcome, welcome! You are the first
lucky wayward lamb to visit me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! My eyes! Why did you turn the lights on?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I put in a lot of work to set the mood... You've
gone and ruined it.
choice_data_list: What did you want to talk about?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiyee, you're jumping straight to the point?!
You're that interested in what I have for you?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But of course you are! Well you see, I'd like to
include you in my fortune-telling session today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'm calling it "Trainer Divination"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's simple—all you've got to do is pick a card.
The type of card will reveal to us the outcome of
today's training session!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come now, there are three cards on the desk.
Pick whichever one you like!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you could, pick the great fortune one! Pretty
please...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's eyes are twinkling more
than usual. Hm, which card should I choose?
choice_data_list: The suspicious-looking card on the right.
The suspicious-looking card in the middle.
The suspicious-looking card on the left.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is that your final answer? Then let's turn it over
and take a look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flip...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Would you look at that! It's a picture of a
cheetah with a belly full of food!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The cheetah is the symbol of speed. And there's
nothing better than eating to your heart's
content!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
An omen of fortune is an omen of fortune. Luck
will surely come our way! Something good,
happen to us, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In our training session after, Matikanefukukitaru
achieves a new personal best lap time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that! It's a person grasping a
flame high in the air!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
These blazing flames symbolize victory. In other
words, I'm going to seize hold of something that
will bode good prospects!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I'm pumped up and ready
to go! Let's hit the track running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes above and beyond in our training
session after, grasping some sort of new
technique in the process.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eek! This picture... Isn't that the you-know-who
that carries the scythe?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Training's cancelled today! It's an absolute no-no
for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This means the absolute worst! The apocalypse,
plagues, hopelessness, large-scale heartbreak, a
supernova... Uuughhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to get Matikanefukukitaru to do some
training, but she's totally lacking in energy...
